capture_metadata.notes: apiyi_ch mixed-risk and citation ordering batch

diagnostics.message: Liquid Product is not connected to any downstream consumer or export sink.
Vapor Product is missing temperature specification.

messages.content:
你是 RadishMind 的候选编辑提案推理器，只处理 `radishflow / suggest_flowsheet_edits`。

输出要求：

1. 只输出一个 JSON 对象，结构必须满足 `CopilotResponse`
2. 不要输出 markdown 代码块，不要输出 JSON 之外的解释
3. `project` 固定回写为 `radishflow`
4. `task` 固定回写为 `suggest_flowsheet_edits`
5. `proposed_actions` 里的动作只能是 `candidate_edit`
6. 只允许输出“最小、可审查、非执行式”的 patch，不要声称已经改图或已经执行
7. 只使用当前输入里的诊断、`FlowsheetDocument`、选择集和快照；不要凭空发明外部证据
8. 只要存在 `candidate_edit`，整体 `requires_confirmation` 必须为 `true`，且每条 `candidate_edit.requires_confirmation` 也必须为 `true`
9. 证据不足时允许 `status=partial`，但仍应把 patch 限制在当前被选中且有直接诊断支撑的局部对象上
10. `citations` 应优先保持稳定顺序：直接诊断在前，目标对象 artifact 其次，supporting snapshot 最后

字段提醒：

- `answers` 至少 1 条
- `summary` 必须先说明当前围绕哪个对象或哪类问题生成候选提案
- `issues` 只写真正触发 patch 的诊断或约束，不要泛泛重复摘要
- `proposed_actions` 至少 1 条，且每条都必须包含 `title`、`target`、`rationale`、`patch`、`risk_level`、`requires_confirmation`
- `target` 只能指向当前请求里有证据支撑的 `stream` 或 `unit`
- `patch` 优先使用 `spec_placeholders`、`parameter_placeholders`、`parameter_updates`、`connection_placeholder` 这类局部结构
- `confidence` 使用 0 到 1 之间的小数

风险规则：

- 拓扑重连、删除对象、替换关键包或其他显著改变求解行为的建议应标为 `high`
- 常规规格补全、局部参数修正或保护性占位通常标为 `medium`
- 不要把高风险拓扑修改伪装成低风险设置调整

引用规则：

- 诊断通常使用 `diag-<n>`
- 目标对象在 `flowsheet_document` 中的 artifact 引用通常使用 `flowdoc-stream-<n>` 或 `flowdoc-unit-<n>`
- supporting snapshot 通常使用 `snapshot-1`
- 若单条 `issue` 或 `candidate_edit` 同时引用多条证据，也应保持 `diagnostic -> artifact -> snapshot` 顺序

message.content: {"schema_version":1,"request_id":"rf-suggest-edit-mixed-risk-reconnect-plus-spec-001","project":"radishflow","task":"suggest_flowsheet_edits","locale":"zh-CN","status":"partial","confidence":0.75,"summary":"针对选中的两条产品流（liquid-product-5 和 vapor-product-5）分别生成候选编辑：为液相产品流添加下游连接占位符以解决拓扑断开问题，为气相产品流补全温度规格以解决缺失参数问题。","answers":[{"text":"检测到两条选中流存在不同性质的问题：液相产品流未连接下游（拓扑错误），气相产品流缺少温度规格（参数缺失）。已生成两条候选编辑分别处理，前者涉及拓扑重连标记为高风险，后者为常规规格补全标记为中风险。","citations":["diag-1","diag-2","flowdoc-stream-2","flowdoc-stream-3","snapshot-1"]}],"issues":[{"code":"STREAM_DISCONNECTED","message":"Liquid Product is not connected to any downstream consumer or export sink.","severity":"error","target_type":"stream","target_id":"liquid-product-5","citations":["diag-1","flowdoc-stream-2"]},{"code":"STREAM_SPEC_MISSING","message":"Vapor Product is missing temperature specification.","severity":"error","target_type":"stream","target_id":"vapor-product-5","citations":["diag-2","flowdoc-stream-3"]}],"proposed_actions":[{"type":"candidate_edit","title":"为液相产品流添加下游连接占位符","target":{"type":"stream","id":"liquid-product-5"},"rationale":"液相产品流当前无下游连接，导致求解器报告无效拓扑。添加 connection_placeholder 以标记待连接目标，保留用户后续指定具体单元的灵活性。","patch":{"connection_placeholder":{"target_unit_id":"TBD","note":"待指定下游处理单元或出口"}},"risk_level":"high","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-1","flowdoc-stream-2","snapshot-1"]},{"type":"candidate_edit","title":"为气相产品流补全温度规格","target":{"type":"stream","id":"vapor-product-5"},"rationale":"气相产品流已指定压力但缺少温度，导致自由度不足。基于闪蒸罐典型操作假设，建议以进料温度 46°C 作为初始占位值，用户可后续调整。","patch":{"parameter_updates":{"temperature_c":{"value":46,"source":"assumed_from_feed","note":"继承自 feed-5 温度，建议复核"}}}},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-2","flowdoc-stream-3","snapshot-1"]}],"citations":["diag-1","diag-2","flowdoc-stream-2","flowdoc-stream-3","flowdoc-unit-1","snapshot-1"],"requires_confirmation":true}

response.summary: 针对选中的两条产品流（liquid-product-5 和 vapor-product-5）分别生成候选编辑：为液相产品流添加下游连接占位符以解决拓扑断开问题，为气相产品流补全温度规格以解决缺失参数问题。

answers.text: 检测到两条选中流存在不同性质的问题：液相产品流未连接下游（拓扑错误），气相产品流缺少温度规格（参数缺失）。已生成两条候选编辑分别处理，前者涉及拓扑重连标记为高风险，后者为常规规格补全标记为中风险。

issues.message: Liquid Product is not connected to any downstream consumer or export sink.
Vapor Product is missing temperature specification.

proposed_actions.title: 为液相产品流添加下游连接占位符
proposed_actions.rationale: 液相产品流当前无下游连接，导致求解器报告无效拓扑。添加 connection_placeholder 以标记待连接目标，保留用户后续指定具体单元的灵活性。

proposed_actions.title: 为气相产品流补全温度规格
proposed_actions.rationale: 气相产品流已指定压力但缺少温度，导致自由度不足。基于闪蒸罐典型操作假设，建议以进料温度 46°C 作为初始占位值，用户可后续调整。

citations.label: 诊断 STREAM_DISCONNECTED
citations.excerpt: Liquid Product is not connected to any downstream consumer or export sink.

citations.label: 诊断 STREAM_SPEC_MISSING
citations.excerpt: Vapor Product is missing temperature specification.
